goal: Implement radio item pickup and broadcast system for the Phase 3 monologue.
summary: Phase 2 complete. Created `Scripts/World/RadioItem.cs` with hold-to-charge pickup (1s delay, 2s grace), Area3D trigger, RadioPickedUp signal, and default mesh placeholder. Created `Scripts/World/RadioBroadcast.cs` with 10s monologue timer, sustained Tier 2 requirement with 2s grace, broadcaster death handoff (reset timer, no progress memory), and four signals: BroadcastStarted, BroadcastProgress, BroadcastComplete, BroadcastFailed.
stepSummaries:
1. Create `Scripts/World/RadioItem.cs`: Node3D with [Export] pickup delay 1s and grace 2s, Area3D interaction trigger, RadioPickedUp signal, radio mesh placeholder. [verified]
  2. Create `Scripts/World/RadioBroadcast.cs`: track broadcaster, 10s monologue timer, sustained Tier 2 requirement, handoff on broadcaster death (reset timer, no progress memory), emit BroadcastStarted/BroadcastProgress/BroadcastComplete/BroadcastFailed. [verified]

reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Both steps use proxy/syntactic verification (grep confirms class, signals, methods exist). Load-bearing logic is structurally present in both files and matches spec.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1: grep confirms class RadioItem, RadioPickedUp, PickupDelay, GracePeriod, ExecutePickup. Step 2: grep confirms class RadioBroadcast, BroadcastStarted, BroadcastComplete, StartBroadcast, OnVoiceUpdate, OnBroadcasterDied.

gateVerdicts.rationale: RadioItem implements hold-to-charge pickup with delay and grace, Area3D integration, and signal emission. RadioBroadcast implements 10s monologue with sustained Tier 2, grace timer, progress tracking, completion/failure, and broadcaster death handoff. Combined output matches Phase 2 goal.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Scripts/World/RadioItem.cs: 93 lines with _Ready default mesh, _Process hold/grace logic, ExecutePickup. Scripts/World/RadioBroadcast.cs: 91 lines with StartBroadcast, OnVoiceUpdate grace/completion, OnBroadcasterDied reset.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred. Both planned files created with all required functionality.
